name: User denies microphone permission — composer surfaces a clear error, mic button stays enabled for retry
description: First-tap mic without prior permission. Browser shows the system permission prompt; user clicks Block. The recording panel never opens. Composer surfaces a one-line error ('microphone permission denied') above the textarea; mic button reverts to idle so the user can fix the permission and retry.

persona.name: Privacy-conscious contractor
persona.context: Has had bad experiences with apps recording in the background. Is testing the app before trusting it.

steps.expect: Recording panel does NOT mount; composer surfaces error pill 'microphone permission denied'; mic button is enabled (no permanent disabled state); textarea remains focusable

steps.action: Types a text message instead and hits Enter
steps.expect: Text path works normally — voice failure does not poison text

steps.action: Re-taps the mic button after granting permission in browser settings
steps.expect: Recording panel mounts; previous error message clears

evaluationCriteria.check: Error pill uses pink/red coloring distinct from chat bubbles; doesn't shift the textarea below it
User is never confused about whether the recording is happening — the permission denial is loud and clear
teardownRecording() runs even on the catch path so audio context + WS resources are released; setError clears on next successful start
Error has role=alert so screen readers announce 'microphone permission denied' immediately
